biography.origin: Born in Kampong Speu province in a poor family
biography.motivation: To avoid poverty, motivated myself to study hard and support family, believing only study can change life
biography.educationBackground: Educated at public school for general education, graduated high school in 2023 with overall grade B
biography.personality: Curious person who really loves science since young with talent related to digital technology field

philosophy: Dedicated to crafting efficient, user-friendly applications that solve real-world problems through clean, maintainable code
